entries.text: We went out to eat for dinner: Vinny’s! They made Joseph feel special by letting him order a dessert from the menu on the house! He was so pleased the staff came out to sing to him. He said it was too good to be true. He felt so special. The waitress said that in the five years she’s worked there she’s never seen such good and polite boys. Another couple nearby echoed her compliments. Love them so!
Good morning! I’m going to the store (Giant) shortly. What do I need again?
